hypothesis: Incorporating explicit active-site motif labels and simple geometric descriptors (mean first-shell metal–adsorbate distance and first-shell coordination number) as additional conditioning inputs to CompGen will increase the average cosine similarity of generated shell-2 compositions to DFT-relaxed ground-truth HEA compositions by at least 0.05 compared to the current CompGen conditioned only on adsorbate, adsorption energy, and element list.
